post.title: Time Is the Honest Axis
post.intent_statement: Hold that the vertical axis must represent chronological truth and nothing else.
post.central_question: What does the vertical line mean?
post.core_insight: Mixing semantic distance into the time axis makes both unreadable.
post.body_html:
The spine is time. Scrolling down travels backward into memory; the newest thought sits at the top.

Meaning does not live on the vertical axis. Relationships branch sideways, as a separate, explainable view.

Keeping the axis honest is what lets the reader trust where they are.
